description_long: This is a small, single-engine aerobatic airplane with a striking Red Bull livery, featuring a predominantly blue fuselage and wings with bold red and white branding. The aircraft has a low-wing configuration with straight wings and pronounced winglets at the tips, enhancing its maneuverability. The nose is painted yellow and houses a single propeller, indicating a piston engine, while the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy situated just behind the engine. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both adorned with additional branding and graphic elements. The landing gear is fixed in a tricycle arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel. The overall design is sleek and optimized for agility, typical of aerobatic and racing aircraft.
description: A small, aerobatic airplane with a bold Red Bull livery, low straight wings with winglets, a yellow nose with a single propeller, and a fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, Red Bull branding on the wings and tail, and the overall symmetrical layout.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the low-wing configuration, winglets, and the detailed Red Bull graphics along the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the yellow nose, single propeller, cockpit canopy, and the width of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the right wing, winglet, and the continuation of the Red Bull branding.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with pronounced upward winglets and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
